result.stdout:
Description:
  ThreadsPoster - A .NET global tool for posting to Threads

Usage:
  threads-poster [command] [options]

Options:
  --verbose-debug  Enable verbose debugging and detailed logging for troubleshooting
  --version        Show version information
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Commands:
  post  Post content to Threads (text, image, or video)
  auth  Authenticate with Threads API

result.stdout:

  Authenticate with Threads API

Options:
  --verbose-debug  Enable verbose debugging and detailed logging for troubleshooting
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Commands:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Post content to Threads (text, image, or video)

Usage:
  threads-poster post [options]

Options:
  -t, --text <text>               Text content to post (max 500 characters)
  -f, --file <file>               Path to file containing text content to post (mutually exclusive with --text)
  -l, --link <link>               Link attachment URL(s) (multiple values supported for consecutive posts)
  -i, --image-path <image-path>   Path to image file(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  --image-url <image-url>         URL to image(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  -v, --video-path <video-path>   Path to video file(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  --video-url <video-url>         URL to video(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  --tag, --topic-tag <topic-tag>  Optional topic tag for the post
  --dry-run                       Validate and prepare the post without actually publishing to Threads
  --verbose-debug                 Enable verbose debugging and detailed logging for troubleshooting
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Post content to Threads (text, image, or video)

Usage:
  threads-poster post [options]

Options:
  -t, --text <text>               Text content to post (max 500 characters)
  -f, --file <file>               Path to file containing text content to post (mutually exclusive with --text)
  -l, --link <link>               Link attachment URL(s) (multiple values supported for consecutive posts)
  -i, --image-path <image-path>   Path to image file(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  --image-url <image-url>         URL to image(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  -v, --video-path <video-path>   Path to video file(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  --video-url <video-url>         URL to video(s) to post (multiple values supported for carousel posts)
  --tag, --topic-tag <topic-tag>  Optional topic tag for the post
  --dry-run                       Validate and prepare the post without actually publishing to Threads
  --verbose-debug                 Enable verbose debugging and detailed logging for troubleshooting
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
